Notice Of Motion To Vacate The Judgment Under An Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. JONATHAN SAUL OF THE THOMAS MINDER & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (916) 929-4400 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE, ON THE SECOND CALL OF THE MATTER AT 10:00 A.M., THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF YAN GIMEL'S Motion To Vacate The Judgment Under An Arbitration Award IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY AND FAILS TO STATE A BASIS FOR RELIEF. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

APPEARANCES:
Jonathan A. Saul, Esq. of Thomas Minder & Associates (916-929-4400), appearing via telephone for defendant and moving party Safeway Inc.
In Pro Per Plaintiff Yan Gimel appearing for himself.

RULING:
Argued and Defendant Safeway, Inc's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Deposition is granted. Deposition is ordered for January 11, 2010. Request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
